# Content type support

This reference compares user-facing capabilities that each content type implements or explicitly supports. Functionality supplied automatically by the shared entry model, such as appearing in the unified library and global search, is not repeated here. The comparison includes shared features and media-specific features that participate in the content-type reference.

Status meanings:

- **✓ Supported**
- **◇ Source-dependent** — requires support from the source
- **— Not available**

<!-- BEGIN GENERATED CONTENT TYPE SUPPORT -->

<!-- Generated by ./gradlew generateContentTypeReference. Do not edit this region. -->

## Entry interactions

| Capability | Anime | Book | Manga |
| --- | :---: | :---: | :---: |
| Open entries in their media experience | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ |
| Continue from saved progress | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ |
| Mark individual child items consumed or unconsumed | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ |
| Show partial progress for individual child items | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ |
| Preserve progress through backup and migration | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ |
| Apply smart library-update restrictions | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ |
| Merge versions from different sources | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ |
| Bookmark individual child items | — | — | ✓ |
| Show gaps between missing child items | — | — | ✓ |
| Filter child items by release group | — | — | ✓ |
| Migrate an entry to another source | ✓ | — | ✓ |
| Clear temporary media cache manually/on app launch | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ |
| Preserve playback preferences through backup and migration | ✓ | — | — |
| Configure media viewer settings | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ |
| Use media-specific terminology and presentation | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ |

## Library and updates

| Capability | Anime | Book | Manga |
| --- | :---: | :---: | :---: |
| Filter and group entries in the unified library | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ |
| Aggregate progress across the library | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ |
| Receive library update notifications | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ |
| Refresh entries during library updates | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ |

## Downloads

| Capability | Anime | Book | Manga |
| --- | :---: | :---: | :---: |
| Download individual child items for offline use | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ |
| Bulk-download child items | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ |
| Automatically download newly discovered child items | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ |
| Delete downloads after marking an item consumed | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ |
| Run queued downloads in the background | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ |
| Configure type-specific download behavior | ✓ | — | ✓ |
| Maintain downloads when entries or sources change | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ |

::: info

Bookmark-based bulk downloads are enabled automatically when the content type supports individual bookmarks.

Bookmark-aware download cleanup is enabled automatically when the content type supports individual bookmarks.

:::

## Discovery and integrations

| Capability | Anime | Book | Manga |
| --- | :---: | :---: | :---: |
| Preview entries while browsing | ◇ | — | ✓ |
| Use immersive browsing | ◇ | — | ◇ |
| Discover related entries from a source | ◇ | ◇ | ◇ |
| Import content through the bundled Local source | — | — | ✓ |
| Use supported legacy Mihon extensions | — | — | ✓ |
| Connect entries to tracking services | — | — | ✓ |
| Load entry covers through source networking | ◇ | ◇ | ◇ |
| Resolve supported links through installed sources | ◇ | ◇ | ◇ |
| Open source home pages | ◇ | ◇ | ◇ |
| Refresh entry details and child items from a source | ◇ | ◇ | ◇ |
| Configure source-specific settings | ◇ | ◇ | ◇ |
| Open entries in a source WebView | ◇ | ◇ | ◇ |
| Open child items in a source WebView | — | — | ◇ |
| Use tracking-service sources in discovery | ◇ | ◇ | ◇ |

<!-- END GENERATED CONTENT TYPE SUPPORT -->

The media-cache row records current built-in user-facing behavior. Runtime provider presence remains authoritative; this
documentation table does not enable or enforce cache support.

Source-provided capabilities and available catalogue content can vary by extension. See [Unified library](unified-library.md), [Book reading](book-reading.md), [Video playback](video-playback.md), and [Extensions and compatibility](../differences/extensions-and-compatibility.md) for details beyond this comparison.
